description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2025 BMW M2, 3.0L TC I6, RWD, 480 bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 359,000 or AED 5,624 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 16,555 KM's - BMW Warranty Valid Until 12th June 2030 or 200,000 KM's - BMW Service Contract Valid Until 12th June 2030 or 100,000 KMs - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Satin PPF - M Alcantara Steering Wheel - 19/20" M Light Alloy Wheels Double-Spoke - M Calipers Painted in High Gloss Red - Carbon Exterior Trim - Carbon Interior Trim - Adaptive Cruise Control - Adaptive LED Headlights - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - M Seat Belts - Blindspot Assist - Lane Keeping Assist - Adaptive M Chassis - Harmon Kardon Surround Sound System - Selective Drive Modes - Ambient Lighting - M Sports Seats - Power Folding Exterior Mirrors - 360 Surround View - Front & Rear Parking Sensors - Wireless Apple Car Play
